rationale: Has 5.2 years with data engineering and lightweight ML (sklearn/XGBoost) experience at product companies, but skills are dominated by OpenCV/CNN with only intermediate Information Retrieval exposure and no evidence of production embeddings-based retrieval, vector databases, or ranking evaluation metrics (NDCG/MAP/MRR).

Strong match: led migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval at CRED (product company), built RAG with Pinecone, expert-level Elasticsearch and Hugging Face Transformers, IIT Bombay education, and explicit evaluation rigor focus — missing direct LambdaMART/NDCG ownership and learning-to-rank depth.

Career is entirely backend/devops at IT-services firms (Tech Mahindra, Cognizant) plus a fictional company (Dunder Mifflin), with skills dominated by Next.js/HTML/TypeScript and only a self-described RAG side project — no production ML, embeddings, or retrieval system experience.

Only 2.2 years of experience, entirely in cloud/DevOps at Razorpay, with Haystack listed as advanced skill (53 months, inconsistent with total experience) and no demonstrated production embeddings or ranking work despite adjacent IR-adjacent tool claims.

Only 2.3 years total, spent at Mphasis (IT services) doing data warehouse/pipeline work, with Information Retrieval as intermediate skill but no production embedding or ranking system experience and no product-company ML deployment.

Non-technical profile spanning accounting, operations, and content writing at fictional companies (Dunder Mifflin, Pied Piper) with zero ML/AI engineering experience — only surface-level ChatGPT curiosity mentioned.

Background is mechanical engineering and content writing at Stark Industries (fictional company), with current title Accountant, no ML or software engineering production experience, and skills (Webpack/Flask/HTML) entirely unrelated to IR or AI systems.

8.3 years of full-stack/QA/backend experience at product companies (Swiggy, CRED) demonstrates engineering depth, but skills are entirely web/infrastructure-oriented (CI/CD, Hadoop, Vue.js) with only a self-learner RAG side project and no production ML, embeddings, or ranking system work.

Entire career at Wipro (IT services) in customer support and graphic design roles with no engineering or ML work — profile is a clear honeypot with non-technical titles and skills (Illustrator, Redis beginner) mismatched to the AI engineering role.

HR Manager at Wayne Enterprises (fictional company) with a marketing/consulting background, zero ML or software engineering production experience, and only superficial AI curiosity via ChatGPT experimentation.
